title: Mạo từ — a, an, the
summary: Quy tắc dùng a/an và the.

sections.heading: 1. Mạo từ không xác định a/an
sections.body:
Dùng **a/an + danh từ đếm được số ít**.

- **an** → trước danh từ bắt đầu bằng **âm nguyên âm** (phát âm, không phải chữ viết): an uncle (/ʌ/), an apple, an hour (/aʊ/ — 'h' câm).
- **a** → trước **âm phụ âm**: a dog, a university (/j/), a one-way street (/w/).

**Không dùng a/an với:**
- Danh từ **số nhiều**: brothers, books…
- Danh từ **không đếm được**: water, air, information, news… → dùng lượng từ: a cup of coffee, a piece of advice.

**Cấu trúc There is + a/an + N** khi giới thiệu lần đầu: *There is a cat on the table.*

**Đo lường:** sixty miles **an** hour, 70 cents **a** dozen.

sections.heading: 2. Mạo từ xác định 'the' — khi đã xác định
sections.body:
Dùng **the** khi:
- Vật/người **đã được nhắc đến** trước đó: *I have a cat. **The** cat is named Miu.*
- Cả người nói và nghe **ngầm hiểu** đang nói về vật gì: *Be careful! You're spilling coffee on **the** floor.*
- Danh từ được bổ nghĩa bởi **cụm giới từ**: *The back **of this room** is dirty.*
- Danh từ được bổ nghĩa bởi **mệnh đề quan hệ**: *The teacher **that we had** last semester was good.*

**Ngữ cố định:** in **the** morning / afternoon / evening. (Nhưng: at night — **không** dùng the).

sections.heading: 3. 'the' với so sánh nhất, thứ tự, duy nhất
sections.body:
- **So sánh nhất:** the most beautiful, the biggest, the best.
- **So sánh kép:** **The** hotter it is, **the** more comfortable I feel.
- **Thứ tự:** the first, the second, the last, the only, the next.
- **Sự vật duy nhất:** the sun, the moon, the sky, the Earth.
- **Trước 'same':** the same grade, the same interests.

sections.heading: 4. 'the' với địa danh và tên riêng
sections.body:
| Dùng **the** | Không dùng mạo từ |
|---|---|
| Sông, biển, đại dương: the Congo River, the Pacific Ocean | Núi riêng lẻ: Mountain Everest |
| Dãy núi, quần đảo: the Alps, the Philippines | Hồ: Lake Ba Be |
| Nước liên bang/viết tắt: the US, the UK, the UAE | Nước đơn lẻ: Thailand, Vietnam |
| The University **of** Utah | Utah State University (tên riêng đứng đầu) |
| — | Tên đường phố: Elm Street, Baker Street |
| — | Công viên, bệnh viện (tên riêng): Hyde Park, Hillsdale Hospital |

sections.heading: 5. 'the' — trường hợp đặc biệt
sections.body:
- **The + tính từ** = nhóm người: the rich (người giàu), the old, the blind, the English.
- **The + nhạc cụ:** play **the** guitar, play **the** piano.
- **The + họ số nhiều** = gia đình: **the** Smiths (nhà Smith).
- **The + lực lượng vũ trang:** the army, the police, the navy.
- **The + phương hướng** (danh từ): from **the** north, in **the** west.
  - Nhưng: trạng từ chỉ hướng di chuyển → **không** dùng the: *Go south.*

sections.heading: 6. Không dùng mạo từ (Zero Article)
sections.body:
- **Danh từ số nhiều nói chung:** Dogs are loyal. Pigeons can fly.
- **Danh từ không đếm được nói chung:** Time is gold. Water is essential.
- **Tên ngôn ngữ:** English, Chinese, Spanish.
- **Tên bệnh:** Heart disease, cancer. (Ngoại lệ: the flu / flu đều được.)
- **Bữa ăn:** have breakfast/lunch/dinner.
- **Cụm cố định:** go to bed, go to school, by hand, at night.
- **Most/All/Some + N (chung chung):** Most women like cosmetics.
  - So sánh: Most **of the** women in my family… (xác định cụ thể).

sections.heading: 7. Ví dụ tổng hợp
sections.body:
- **an** uncle, **an** hour, **a** university, **a** one-way street.
- In **the** morning / at night (không dùng 'the').
- I live on Phan Dinh Phung street. (Tên đường → Ø)
- **The** University of Architecture / Foreign Trade University (Ø).
- Alaska is **the** biggest state in **the** U.S.
- **The** hotter it is, **the** more comfortable I feel.
- **The** Smiths live next door. (Gia đình nhà Smith)
- Play **the** piano. / Go to bed. (Ø)

exercises.question: He is _______ ugly man.
exercises.explanation: 'ugly' bắt đầu bằng âm nguyên âm /ʌ/ → an.

exercises.question: There was _______ piano in the corner of the room.
exercises.explanation: Lần đầu nhắc đến, 'piano' bắt đầu bằng âm phụ âm /p/ → a.

exerciseSets.title: Điền mạo từ — Ex 1
exerciseSets.description: Điền a, an, the hoặc Ø (không dùng) vào chỗ trống.

exercises.question: There is _______ interesting movie playing at the Valley Art Theater.
exercises.explanation: 'interesting' bắt đầu bằng nguyên âm /ɪ/ → an.

exercises.question: My parents live in a country where there are _______ long cold winters.
exercises.explanation: Danh từ số nhiều nói chung, không xác định → không dùng mạo từ.

exercises.question: The Airbus is made by _______ European company.
exercises.explanation: 'European' phát âm /jʊ/ (âm phụ âm) → a.

exercises.question: What _______ honor it is to meet the Queen!
exercises.explanation: 'honor' có âm câm /h/, bắt đầu bằng nguyên âm /ɒ/ → an.

exercises.question: I saw _______ horrible accident last week.
exercises.explanation: 'horrible' phát âm /h/ (âm phụ âm) → a.

exercises.question: The police often call _______ unknown thief Mr. Joe.
exercises.explanation: Xác định cụ thể 'unknown thief' được nói đến → the.

exercises.question: _______ whales breathe air.
exercises.explanation: Nói về loài nói chung (số nhiều) → không dùng mạo từ.

exercises.question: Everything went wrong, we had _______ terrible time.
exercises.explanation: Cụm 'have a terrible time' → a.

exercises.question: _______ time and space are related.
exercises.explanation: Khái niệm trừu tượng nói chung → không dùng mạo từ.

exercises.question: Wait a minute: I've got _______ idea!
exercises.explanation: 'idea' bắt đầu bằng nguyên âm /aɪ/ → an.

exercises.question: A snail moves only a few inches _______ hour.
exercises.explanation: 'hour' có /h/ câm, bắt đầu âm nguyên âm /aʊ/ → an.

exercises.question: A storm struck the coast of Vietnam. _______ storm caused a lot of damage.
exercises.explanation: Lần thứ hai nhắc đến 'storm' (đã xác định) → the.

exercises.question: A thousand is ten times more than _______ hundred.
exercises.explanation: 'a hundred' = một trăm.

exercises.question: _______ eulogy is usually a speech about someone who has died.
exercises.explanation: 'eulogy' phát âm /juː/ (âm phụ âm /j/) → a.

exercises.question: _______ unknown person stole a TV from my mother's home.
exercises.explanation: 'unknown' bắt đầu bằng nguyên âm /ʌ/ → an.

exercises.question: I know the melody of that song, but I don't know _______ words.
exercises.explanation: 'words' đã xác định (của bài hát đó) → the.

exercises.question: I made some coffee. _______ coffee was too strong.
exercises.explanation: Lần thứ hai nhắc đến 'coffee' → the.

exercises.question: _______ "E" looks like a "3" in a mirror.
exercises.explanation: Chữ 'E' phát âm /iː/ (nguyên âm) → an.

exercises.question: My friend went fishing and fell into _______ water.
exercises.explanation: Nước ở nơi câu cá (xác định theo ngữ cảnh) → the.

exercises.question: My last name begins with _______ "C".
exercises.explanation: Chữ 'C' phát âm /siː/ (phụ âm /s/) → a.

exercises.question: _______ oxygen is needed for all people.
exercises.explanation: Chất nói chung → không dùng mạo từ.

exercises.question: I read _______ book on geology last week.
exercises.explanation: Một cuốn sách không xác định → a.

exercises.question: _______ members of that band are very talented.
exercises.explanation: Xác định cụ thể 'of that band' → the.

exercises.question: A birthday cake usually has _______ candles on it.
exercises.explanation: Nến nói chung, không xác định → không dùng mạo từ.

exercises.question: Many of _______ airliners in the world are made in Washington State.
exercises.explanation: 'Many of the + N' = nhiều trong số những cái (xác định).

exercises.question: Most _______ dogs hate cats.
exercises.explanation: 'Most + N (chung chung)' → không dùng mạo từ.

exercises.question: All of _______ fish in the river died.
exercises.explanation: 'All of the + N' xác định cụ thể → the.

exercises.question: I picked up the sugar bowl, and some of _______ sugar fell on the floor.
exercises.explanation: Đường trong bát (xác định) → the.

exercises.question: Some _______ movies are good, and others aren't.
exercises.explanation: 'Some + N (chung chung)' → không dùng mạo từ.

exercises.question: Is this _______ road to Santa Fe?
exercises.explanation: Con đường cụ thể dẫn đến Santa Fe → the.

exercises.question: In _______ town where I was born lived a man who sailed to sea.
exercises.explanation: Xác định bởi mệnh đề quan hệ 'where I was born' → the.

exercises.question: _______ blue whales are the largest animals that ever lived.
exercises.explanation: Loài nói chung (số nhiều) → không dùng mạo từ.

exercises.question: You don't have _______ camera, do you?
exercises.explanation: Một chiếc máy ảnh bất kỳ → a.

exercises.question: I spent the day at the ocean sitting on _______ shore.
exercises.explanation: Bờ biển xác định (của đại dương đó) → the.

exercises.question: Our store is on the northwest corner of _______ Main Street and Elm Road.
exercises.explanation: Tên đường phố → không dùng mạo từ.

exercises.question: I saw _______ exciting soccer game last week.
exercises.explanation: 'exciting' bắt đầu bằng nguyên âm /ɪ/ → an.

exercises.question: She looks down at _______ papers lying on her desk.
exercises.explanation: Giấy tờ xác định (trên bàn cô ấy) → the.

exercises.question: I prefer apples to _______ oranges.
exercises.explanation: Trái cam nói chung → không dùng mạo từ.

exercises.question: They're tearing up _______ street in front of my house.
exercises.explanation: Con đường cụ thể (trước nhà tôi) → the.

exercises.question: _______ unemployment is a growing problem.
exercises.explanation: Danh từ trừu tượng nói chung → không dùng mạo từ.

exercises.question: Dr. Finley has a degree from _______ University of the Americas in Mexico.
exercises.explanation: Tên trường có 'of' → the University of…

exercises.question: _______ College of Design is no longer located in Hascall Hall.
exercises.explanation: Tên trường có 'of' → The College of Design.

exercises.question: How long have you been in _______ U.S?
exercises.explanation: Tên nước viết tắt (the U.S.) → the.

exercises.question: _______ University of Green Village has over 10,000 students.
exercises.explanation: Tên trường có 'of' → The University of…

exercises.question: Mr. Smith liked Johnny's essay even though _______ boy's spelling was poor.
exercises.explanation: Cậu bé đã xác định (Johnny) → the.

exercises.question: Greenville is very old and many of _______ town's buildings need repair.
exercises.explanation: Thị trấn xác định (Greenville) → the.

exercises.question: That's _______ worst movie I've ever seen!
exercises.explanation: So sánh nhất → the worst.

exercises.question: _______ Bay City University is well-known for its Drama Department.
exercises.explanation: Tên trường không có 'of' → không dùng the.

exercises.question: Muhammad Ali was one of _______ greatest boxers of all time.
exercises.explanation: So sánh nhất → the greatest.

exercises.question: _______ Cochies College is also known as CC.
exercises.explanation: Tên trường không có 'of' → không dùng the.

exerciseSets.title: Trắc nghiệm Mạo từ (ET1037)
exerciseSets.description: 50 câu trắc nghiệm chọn a, an, the hoặc Ø.

exercises.question: There was _______ piano in the corner of the room.
exercises.explanation: 'piano' bắt đầu bằng phụ âm /p/, lần đầu nhắc đến → a.

exercises.question: It is fun to learn English on _______ computer.
exercises.explanation: Một chiếc máy tính bất kỳ → a.

exercises.question: Are they _______ students?
exercises.explanation: Danh từ số nhiều không xác định → không dùng mạo từ.

exercises.question: Have you ever been to _______ British Museum?
exercises.explanation: Tên bảo tàng xác định → the British Museum.

exercises.question: We only have _______ hour to complete the test.
exercises.explanation: 'hour' có /h/ câm, bắt đầu nguyên âm /aʊ/ → an.

exercises.question: _______ Hyde Park is a very large park in central London.
exercises.explanation: Tên công viên → không dùng mạo từ.

exercises.question: I would like _______ rice with my curry.
exercises.explanation: 'rice' không đếm được, nói chung → Ø.

exercises.question: He is _______ English man.
exercises.explanation: 'English' bắt đầu bằng nguyên âm /ɪ/ → an.

exercises.question: He is _______ English.
exercises.explanation: Quốc tịch dùng như tính từ → Ø (He is English).

exercises.question: We may have _______ look at the magazines?
exercises.explanation: Cụm 'have a look' → a.

exercises.question: Children usually begin to go to _______ school at _______ age of six.
exercises.explanation: 'go to school' (mục đích) → Ø; 'at the age of' → the.

exercises.question: Finally we got to _______ house where our grandfather and grandmother had once lived.
exercises.explanation: Xác định bởi mệnh đề quan hệ 'where…' → the.

exercises.question: Sam is _______ man to speak at the conference tomorrow.
exercises.explanation: Người cụ thể (duy nhất phát biểu) → the.

exercises.question: Birds can fly in _______ sky.
exercises.explanation: 'the sky' — duy nhất → the.

exercises.question: All work had to be done by _______ hand when there were no modern machines.
exercises.explanation: Cụm 'by hand' (bằng tay) → không dùng mạo từ.

exercises.question: She is _______ tallest girl in the school.
exercises.explanation: So sánh nhất → the tallest.

exercises.question: Where is _______ pretty, pink sweater I bought last week?
exercises.explanation: Xác định bởi 'I bought last week' → the.

exercises.question: I want to see _______ movie. I don't care which one we see.
exercises.explanation: Một bộ phim bất kỳ (don't care which one) → a.

exercises.question: Can you play _______ piano?
exercises.explanation: Nhạc cụ: play the piano → the.

exercises.question: Do you like _______ my new glasses?
exercises.explanation: Đã có tính từ sở hữu 'my' → không dùng thêm mạo từ.

exercises.question: I want to introduce you to Sharon. She is _______ very nice person.
exercises.explanation: Lần đầu giới thiệu, danh từ đếm được số ít → a.

exercises.question: She needs _______ water. She is really thirsty.
exercises.explanation: 'water' không đếm được, không xác định → Ø.

exercises.question: Canada is one of _______ biggest countries in the world.
exercises.explanation: So sánh nhất → the biggest.

exercises.question: Quick! Someone call _______ police. I need help right now.
exercises.explanation: 'the police' — tổ chức xác định → the.

exercises.question: Do you like _______ my wedding dress?
exercises.explanation: Đã có 'my' → không dùng thêm mạo từ.

exercises.question: I need _______ new computer. I'm going to the electronics store to pick one out today.
exercises.explanation: Một chiếc máy tính bất kỳ → a.

exercises.question: I want to have _______ apple for _______ lunch.
exercises.explanation: 'apple' bắt đầu nguyên âm → an; 'lunch' (bữa ăn) → Ø.

exercises.question: _______ Grand Hotel is in _______ Baker Street.
exercises.explanation: Tên khách sạn → The Grand Hotel; tên đường → Ø.

exercises.question: Can you give me _______ little more information about the house?
exercises.explanation: 'a little' = một chút → a.

exercises.question: I like _______ beautiful, brown coffee table in your living room. Where did you buy it?
exercises.explanation: Cái bàn xác định (trong phòng khách của bạn) → the.

exercises.question: The largest landmass is divided into two continents along _______ Ural mountains.
exercises.explanation: Tên dãy núi → the Ural mountains.

exercises.question: There are only _______ few mistakes in your composition. Don't make _______ same ones any more.
exercises.explanation: 'a few' = vài cái; 'the same' → the.

exercises.question: What _______ day we are having today!
exercises.explanation: Câu cảm thán: What + a + N đếm được số ít → a.

exercises.question: Lisa met one of her old friends on his way _______ home from Vancouver.
exercises.explanation: Cụm cố định 'on the way home' — 'home' không dùng mạo từ.

exercises.question: Spring is _______ best season of the year. Autumn is _______ busy season.
exercises.explanation: So sánh nhất → the best; nhắc đến lần đầu → a busy season.

exercises.question: My girlfriend bought _______ dress _______ last weekend.
exercises.explanation: Một chiếc váy bất kỳ → a; 'last weekend' → Ø.

exercises.question: Kent always has _______ lunch in a restaurant.
exercises.explanation: Bữa ăn (have lunch) → không dùng mạo từ.

exercises.question: Wendy is _______ eleven-year-old girl.
exercises.explanation: 'eleven' bắt đầu bằng nguyên âm /ɪ/ → an.

exercises.question: _______ sun and the moon both set in _______ west.
exercises.explanation: Duy nhất: the sun; phương hướng: the west → the, the.

exercises.question: I will keep _______ eye on the baby when its father is away.
exercises.explanation: Cụm 'keep an eye on' = để mắt đến → an.

exercises.question: "James is not coming tonight." — "Oh, that is _______ bad news."
exercises.explanation: 'news' không đếm được → không dùng mạo từ.

exercises.question: I'm not the man to give you _______ advice.
exercises.explanation: 'advice' không đếm được → Ø.

exercises.question: I just want to ask you for _______ advice.
exercises.explanation: 'advice' không đếm được, nói chung → Ø.

exercises.question: _______ advice he had got from most of his friends was to turn down _______ offer.
exercises.explanation: Lời khuyên xác định (từ bạn bè) → the; lời đề nghị xác định → the.

exercises.question: _______ equipment from _______ wrecked plane has to be saved.
exercises.explanation: Thiết bị xác định (từ máy bay đó) → the; máy bay xác định → the.

exercises.question: It was nearly _______ midnight, and Margaret rose to go.
exercises.explanation: 'midnight' — thời điểm trong ngày → Ø.

exercises.question: As _______ boy Herbert wanted to study _______ music.
exercises.explanation: 'a boy' = khi còn là một cậu bé; 'music' (môn học/nghệ thuật) → Ø.

exercises.question: We got back to _______ inn as _______ night was falling.
exercises.explanation: Quán trọ xác định → the; 'night was falling' (trời tối dần) → Ø.

exercises.question: I paid my first visit to them on _______ clear cold February night.
exercises.explanation: Một đêm tháng Hai không xác định → a.

exercises.question: Charles was in a hurry to get back home by _______ midnight.
exercises.explanation: 'midnight' — thời điểm trong ngày → Ø.
